entries.name: Fel Domination
entries.desc: Your next Imp, Voidwalker, Incubus, Succubus, Felhunter, or Felguard Summon spell is free and has its casting time reduced by 90%.

entries.name: Soul Leech
entries.desc: All single-target damage done by you and your minions grants you and your pet shadowy shields that absorb 3% of the damage dealt for 15 sec, up to 5% of maximum health.

entries.name: Burning Rush
entries.desc: Increases your movement speed by 50%, but also damages you for 4% of your maximum health every 1 sec. Movement impairing effects may not reduce you below 100% of normal movement speed. Lasts until canceled.

entries.name: Fel Pact
entries.desc: Reduces the cooldown of Fel Domination by 60 sec.

entries.name: Demon Skin
entries.desc:
Your Soul Leech absorption now passively recharges at a rate of 0.2% of maximum health every 1 sec, and may now absorb an additional 5% of maximum health.

Increases your armor by 45%.

entries.name: Fel Armor
entries.desc:
When Soul Leech absorbs damage, 5% of damage taken is absorbed and spread out over 5 sec.

Reduces damage taken by 1.5%.

entries.name: Fiendish Stride
entries.desc: Reduces the damage dealt by Burning Rush by 10%. Burning Rush increases your movement speed by an additional 20%.

entries.name: Demonic Embrace
entries.desc: Stamina increased by 10%.

entries.name: Nightmare
entries.desc: Increases the amount of damage required to break your fear effects by 60%.

entries.name: Horrify
entries.desc: Your Fear causes the target to tremble in place instead of fleeing in fear.

entries.name: Demonic Fortitude
entries.desc: Increases you and your pets' maximum health by 5%.

entries.name: Banish
entries.desc: Banishes an enemy Demon, Aberration, or Elemental, preventing any action for 30 sec. Limit 1. Casting Banish again on the target will cancel the effect.

entries.name: Curse of Exhaustion
entries.desc:
Reduces the target's movement speed by 50% for 12 sec.

Curses: A warlock can only have one Curse active per target.

entries.name: Curse of Tongues
entries.desc:
Forces the target to speak in Demonic, increasing the casting time of all spells by 30% for 1 min.

Curses: A warlock can only have one Curse active per target.

entries.name: Infernal Beneficiary
entries.desc: Healing done by Drain Life also heals your primary demon at 400% effectiveness.

entries.name: Mortal Coil
entries.desc: Horrifies an enemy target into fleeing, incapacitating for 3 sec and healing you for 20% of maximum health.

entries.name: Pact of the Annihilan
entries.desc: Increases your critical strike chance by 2%.

entries.name: Demonic Circle
entries.desc:
Summons a Demonic Circle for 15 min. Cast Demonic Circle: Teleport to teleport to its location and remove all movement slowing effects.

You also learn:

 Demonic Circle: Teleport
Teleports you to your Demonic Circle and removes all movement slowing effects.

entries.name: Pact of the Satyr
entries.desc: Increases your haste by 2%.

entries.name: Improved Mortal Coil
entries.desc: Increases the range of Mortal Coil by 10 yds and Mortal Coil now heals for an additional 5% of maximum health.

entries.name: Dark Pact
entries.desc: Sacrifices 20% of your current health to shield you for 200% of the sacrificed health plus an additional 950 for 20 sec. Usable while suffering from control impairing effects.

entries.name: Foul Mouth
entries.desc: Casting Curse of Exhaustion, Curse of Tongues, or Curse of Weakness now curses all enemies within 10 yds of the target.

entries.name: Empowered Healthstone
entries.desc: Healthstones heal you for an additional 5% additional health.

entries.name: Abyss Walker
entries.desc: Using Demonic Circle: Teleport or your Demonic Gateway reduces all damage you take by 4% for 10 sec.

entries.name: Fortified Soul
entries.desc: Soul Leech may now absorb an additional 5% of your maximum health.

entries.name: Teachings of the Black Harvest
entries.desc:
Your primary pets gain a bonus effect.

Imp: Successful Singe Magic casts grant the target 4% damage reduction for 5 sec.

Voidwalker: Reduces the cooldown of Shadow Bulwark by 30 sec.

Felhunter: Reduces the cooldown of Devour Magic by 5 sec.

Sayaad: Reduces the cooldown of Seduction by 10 sec and causes the target to walk faster towards the demon.

entries.name: Gorefiend's Avarice
entries.desc: Drain Life now channels 100% faster and restores health 100% faster.

entries.name: Ichor of Devils
entries.desc: Dark Pact sacrifices only 5% of your current health for the same shield value.

entries.name: Frequent Donor
entries.desc: Reduces the cooldown of Dark Pact by 15 sec.

entries.name: Pact of the Eredar
entries.desc: Increases your Intellect by 3%.

entries.name: Pact of the Nathrezim
entries.desc: Increases your Leech by 2%.

entries.name: Demonic Resilience
entries.desc: Reduces the chance you will be critically struck by 2%. All damage your primary demon takes is reduced by 8%.

entries.name: Empowered Drain Life
entries.desc: Drain Life heals for an additional 200% of damage dealt and grants Soul Leech equal to 10% of damage dealt.

entries.name: Strength of Will
entries.desc: Unending Resolve reduces damage taken by an additional 15%.

entries.name: Dark Accord
entries.desc: Reduces the cooldown of Unending Resolve by 45 sec.

entries.name: Demonic Gateway
entries.desc: Creates a demonic gateway between two locations. Activating the gateway transports the user to the other gateway. Each player can use a Demonic Gateway only once per 90 sec.

entries.name: Howl of Terror
entries.desc: Let loose a terrifying howl, causing 5 enemies within 10 yds to flee in fear, disorienting them for 20 sec. Damage may cancel the effect.

entries.name: Shadowfury
entries.desc: Stuns all enemies within 8 yds for 3 sec.

entries.name: Swift Artifice
entries.desc: Reduces the cast time of Soulstone and Create Healthstone by 50%.

entries.name: Soul Link
entries.desc:
5% of all damage you take is taken by your demon pet instead. 

While Grimoire of Sacrifice is active, your Stamina is increased by 3%.

entries.name: Frequent Traveler
entries.desc: Reduces the cast time of Demonic Gateway by 0.5 sec and you can now use Demonic Gateways twice before triggering a cooldown.

entries.name: Fel Synergy
entries.desc: Soul Leech also heals you for 8% and your pet for 25% of the absorption it grants.

entries.name: Oppressive Darkness
entries.desc:
Reduces the cooldown of Shadowfury by 15 sec and increases its radius by 2 yds.

Reduces the cooldown of Howl of Terror by 5 sec and it now fears 5 additional enemies.

entries.name: Pact of Gluttony
entries.desc:
Healthstones you conjure for yourself are now Demonic Healthstones and can be used multiple times in combat. Demonic Healthstones cannot be traded.

 Demonic Healthstone
Instantly restores 25% health. 60 sec cooldown.

entries.name: Soulburn
entries.desc:
Consumes a Soul Shard, unlocking the hidden power of your spells.

Demonic Circle: Teleport: Increases your movement speed by 50% and makes you immune to snares and roots for 6 sec.

Demonic Gateway: Can be cast instantly.

Drain Life: Gain an absorb shield equal to the amount of healing done for 30 sec. This shield cannot exceed 30% of your maximum health.

Healthstone: Increases the healing of your Healthstone by 30% and increases your maximum health by 20% for 12 sec.

entries.name: Blight of Weakness
entries.desc:
Call forth a cloud of cloying shadow mist that envelopes the target and all enemies within 10 yds, increasing the time between their attacks by 100% and reducing their critical strike chance by 10% for 12 sec.

Curses: A warlock can only have one Curse or Blight active per target.

entries.name: Blight of Tongues
entries.desc:
Call forth a cloud of cloying shadow mist that envelopes the target and all enemies within 10 yds, increasing their casting time of all spells by 100% for 12 sec.

Curses: A warlock can only have one Curse or Blight active per target.

entries.name: Agony
entries.desc:
Inflicts increasing agony on the target, causing up to 2,379 Shadow damage over 18 sec. Damage starts low and increases over the duration. Refreshing Agony maintains its current damage level.

Agony damage sometimes generates 1 Soul Shard.

entries.name: Unstable Affliction
entries.desc:
Afflicts the target with 1,287 Shadow damage over 8 sec. Multiple uses of this ability may overlap.

If dispelled, deals 14,850 damage to the dispeller and silences them for 4 sec. This damage is increased by 15% per stack on the target.

Generates 1 Soul Shard if the target dies while afflicted.

entries.name: Seed of Corruption
entries.desc:
Embeds a demon seed in the enemy target that will explode after 10.7 sec, dealing 899 Shadow damage to all enemies within 10 yards and applying Corruption to them. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.

The seed will detonate early if the target is hit by other detonations, or takes 190 damage from your spells.

entries.name: Nightfall
entries.desc:
Corruption damage has a chance to cause your next Shadow Bolt or Malefic Grasp to deal 25% increased damage. 

Shadow Bolt is instant cast and Malefic Grasp channels 50% faster when affected.

entries.name: Haunt
entries.desc:
A ghostly soul haunts a single target, dealing 2,741 Shadow damage and increasing your damage dealt to the target by 12% for 18 sec.

 If the target dies, Haunt's cooldown is reset.

entries.name: Shared Agony
entries.desc: Increases Agony damage by 10% and Agony now hits another nearby enemy within 15 yds of the target.

entries.name: Improved Shadow Bolt
entries.desc: Reduces the cast time of Shadow Bolt by 15% and increases its damage by 40%.

entries.name: Drain Soul
entries.desc:
Replaces Shadow Bolt.

Drains the target's soul, causing 2,117 Shadow damage over 4.5 sec.

Damage is increased by 100% against enemies below 20% health.

Generates 1 Soul Shard if the target dies during this effect.

entries.name: Improved Haunt
entries.desc: Increases the damage of Haunt by 35% and reduces its cast time by 0.3 sec.

entries.name: Absolute Corruption
entries.desc:
Corruption is now permanent and deals 15% increased damage.

Duration reduced to 24 sec against players.

entries.name: Siphon Life
entries.desc: Corruption deals 30% increased damage and its periodic damage heals you for 5% of the damage dealt.

entries.name: Cunning Cruelty
entries.desc: Shadow Bolt and Drain Soul have a chance to trigger a Shadow Bolt Volley, dealing 472 Shadow damage to 5 enemies within 10 yards of your current target.

entries.name: Withering Bolt
entries.desc: Shadow Bolt and Drain Soul deal 5% increased damage, up to 15%, per damage over time effect you have active on the target.

entries.name: Creeping Death
entries.desc: Your Agony, Corruption, and Unstable Affliction deal damage 10% faster.

entries.name: Dark Harvest
entries.desc:
Consume the life force of each target afflicted by your damaging periodic effects, dealing 12,764 Shadowflame damage over 2.7 sec.

Damage dealt by Dark Harvest heals you for 50% of damage done.

entries.name: Practiced Pestilence
entries.desc: Mastery increased by 2%.

entries.name: Summon Darkglare
entries.desc:
Summons a Darkglare from the Twisting Nether that increases the damage of your Agony, Corruption, and Unstable Affliction by 20% while active.

The Darkglare will serve you for 20 sec, blasting its target for 1,891 Shadow damage, increased by 10% for every damage over time effect you have active on their current target.

entries.name: Summoner's Embrace
entries.desc: Increases the damage dealt by your spells and your demon by 3%.

entries.name: Grimoire of Sacrifice
entries.desc:
Sacrifices your demon pet for power, gaining its command demon ability, and causing your spells to sometimes also deal 142 additional Shadow damage.

Lasts until canceled or until you summon a demon pet.

entries.name: Cull the Weak
entries.desc: Casting Unstable Affliction or Seed of Corruption reduces the cooldown of Dark Harvest by 1.5 sec.

entries.name: Malediction
entries.desc: Increases the critical strike chance of Agony, Corruption, and Unstable Affliction by 5%.

entries.name: Sudden Onset
entries.desc: Agony damage is increased by 10% and starts at 3 stacks.

entries.name: Eye Contract
entries.desc: Increases the duration of Summon Darkglare by 5.0 sec.

entries.name: Malefic Grasp
entries.desc:
While Darkglare is active, your Shadow Bolt becomes Malefic Grasp. 

 Malefic Grasp
Binds the target in twilight, dealing 4,003 Shadow damage over 3.6 sec.

When Malefic Grasp deals damage, it causes all of your other periodic Affliction damage effects to instantly deal 30% of their normal periodic damage.

entries.name: Nether Plating
entries.desc:
Adorns your Darkglare with armor forged from within Antorus, increasing their armor by 10%. 

Eye Beam now jumps to up to 4 additional targets within 10 yards and deals 10% increased damage.

entries.name: Sacrolash's Dark Strike
entries.desc: Corruption damage is increased by 15%, and each time it deals damage any of your Curses active on the target are extended by 0.5 sec.

entries.name: Contagion
entries.desc: Increases critical strike damage dealt by Agony, Corruption, and Unstable Affliction by 15%.

entries.name: Shard Instability
entries.desc: Damage dealt by Shadow Bolt has a 20% chance to make your next Unstable Affliction cost no Soul Shards and cast instantly.

entries.name: Niskaran Methods
entries.desc: Increases damage dealt by Agony and Corruption by 10%.

entries.name: Potent Soul Shards
entries.desc: Increases damage dealt by Unstable Affliction and Seed of Corruption by 5%.

entries.name: Nocturnal Yield
entries.desc: Increases Corruption damage by 10% and Nightfall additionally makes your next Seed of Corruption cost no Soul Shards and cast instantly.

entries.name: Xavius' Gambit
entries.desc: Reduces the cast time of Unstable Affliction by 0.15 sec and increases its damage by 5%.

entries.name: Ravenous Afflictions
entries.desc: Critical strikes from your Agony, Corruption, and Unstable Affliction have a chance to grant Nightfall.

entries.name: Seeds of Destruction
entries.desc: Reduces the cast time of Seed of Corruption by 0.20 sec and increases its damage by 5%.

entries.name: Fatal Echoes
entries.desc: When Unstable Affliction expires, it has a 10% chance to reapply itself.

entries.name: Cascading Calamity
entries.desc: Casting Unstable Affliction on a target affected by your Unstable Affliction increases your Haste by 5% for 15 sec.

entries.name: Death's Embrace
entries.desc: Agony, Corruption, Unstable Affliction, Seed of Corruption, and Shadow Bolt deal up to 40% increased damage on targets below 35% health. Damage increase is higher against lower health targets.

entries.name: Patient Zero
entries.desc: Increases damage dealt by Seed of Corruption to its host by 50%.

entries.name: Sow the Seeds
entries.desc: Seed of Corruption now embeds demon seeds into 2 additional nearby enemies at 50% effectiveness.

entries.name: Shadow of Nathreza
entries.desc:
Haunt now calls upon a demonic soul from within the Twisting Nether to haunt your target.

The soul is unstable and ravenous, dealing 2,474 Shadow damage to its host and 3 enemies within 10 yards suffering from your Corruption over its duration.

entries.name: Wicked Reaping
entries.desc:
Damage dealt by your demonic soul is increased by 10%.

Consuming Demonic Core feeds the demonic entity within you, causing it to appear and deal 914 Shadow damage to your target.

entries.name: Shared Fate
entries.desc:
When you kill a target, its tortured soul is flung into a nearby enemy for 3 sec. This effect inflicts 190 Shadow damage to enemies within 10 yds every 0.9 sec.

Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

entries.name: Feast of Souls
entries.desc: When you kill a target, you have a chance to generate a Soul Shard that is guaranteed to be a Succulent Soul.

entries.name: Eternal Servitude
entries.desc: Fel Domination cooldown is reduced by 90 sec.

entries.name: Gorefiend's Resolve
entries.desc: Targets resurrected with Soulstone resurrect with 40% additional health and 80% additional mana.

entries.name: Necrolyte Teachings
entries.desc: Shadow Bolt damage increased by 20%. Power Siphon increases the damage of Demonbolt by an additional 20%.

entries.name: Demoniac's Fervor
entries.desc: Your demonic soul deals 100% increased damage to the main target of Hand of Gul'dan.

entries.name: Sataiel's Volition
entries.desc: Wild Imp damage increased by 35% and Wild Imps that are imploded have an additional 5% chance to grant a Demonic Core.

entries.name: Quietus
entries.desc:
Soul Anathema damage increased by 25% and is dealt 20% faster.

Consuming Demonic Core activates Shared Fate or Feast of Souls.

entries.name: Soul Anathema
entries.desc:
Unleashing your demonic soul bestows a fiendish entity unto the soul of its targets, dealing 488 Shadow damage over 10 sec.

If this effect is reapplied, any remaining damage will be added to the new Soul Anathema.

entries.name: Gorebound Fortitude
entries.desc: You always gain the benefit of Soulburn when consuming a Healthstone, increasing its healing by 30% and increasing your maximum health by 20% for 12 sec.

entries.name: Friends In Dark Places
entries.desc: Dark Pact now shields you for an additional 50% of the sacrificed health.

entries.name: Demonic Soul
entries.desc:
A demonic entity now inhabits your soul, allowing you to detect if a Soul Shard has a Succulent Soul when it's generated.

Consuming a Succulent Soul unleashes your demonic soul, dealing 1,342 Shadow damage to all enemies within 10 yds of the target. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.

entries.name: Shadow of Death
entries.desc: Your Summon Demonic Tyrant spell is empowered by the demonic entity within you, causing it to grant 3 Soul Shards that each contain a Succulent Soul.

entries.name: Eternal Hunger
entries.desc: Increases the duration of Manifested Avarice by 5 sec and increases the damage of Soul Swipe by 10%.

entries.name: Shared Vessel
entries.desc:
Increases your Mastery by 2%.

This effect is doubled while the demonic entity is aiding you in combat.

entries.name: Manifested Avarice
entries.desc:
Each Succulent Soul consumed has an increasing chance to unleash the Demonic Soul within you, enabling it to assault your enemies for 9 sec.

 Soul Swipe
Strikes nearby enemies with a malevolent claw, dealing 742 Shadow damage to its target and 495 Shadow damage to other enemies in 10 yds.

entries.name: Curse of the Satyr
entries.desc:
Curse of Weakness is empowered and transforms into Curse of the Satyr.

 Curse of the Satyr
Increases the time between an enemy's attacks by 20% and the casting time of all spells by 30% for 2 min.

Curses: A warlock can only have one Curse active per target.

entries.name: Aura of Enfeeblement
entries.desc: While Unending Resolve is active, enemies within 30 yds are affected by Curse of Tongues and Curse of Weakness at 100% effectiveness.

entries.name: Seeds of Their Demise
entries.desc:
After Wither reaches 8 stacks or when its host reaches 20% health, Wither deals 378 Shadowflame damage to its host every 1 sec until 1 stack remains.

When Blackened Soul deals damage, you have a chance to gain Shard Instability.

entries.name: Mark of Xavius
entries.desc:
Wither damage increased by 25%.

Blackened Soul deals 2% increased damage per stack of Wither.

entries.name: Zevrim's Resilience
entries.desc: Dark Pact heals you for 625 every 1 sec while active.

entries.name: Illhoof's Design
entries.desc: Sacrifice 10% of your maximum health. Soul Leech now absorbs an additional 15% of your maximum health.

entries.name: Blackened Soul
entries.desc:
Spending Soul Shards on damaging spells will further corrupt enemies affected by your Wither, increasing its stack count by 1.

Each time Wither gains a stack it has a chance to collapse, consuming a stack every 1 sec to deal 378 Shadowflame damage to its host until 1 stack remains.

entries.name: Wither
entries.desc:
Bestows a vile malediction upon the target, burning the sinew and muscle of its host, dealing 76 Shadowflame damage immediately and an additional 1,285 Shadowflame damage over 18 sec.

Replaces Corruption.

entries.name: Malevolence
entries.desc:
Dark magic erupts from you and corrupts your soul for 20 sec, causing enemies suffering from your Wither to take 4,808 Shadowflame damage and increase its stack count by 6.

While corrupted your Haste is increased by 8% and spending Soul Shards on damaging spells grants 1 additional stack of Wither.

entries.name: Mark of Peroth'arn
entries.desc:
Critical strike damage dealt by Wither is increased by 10%. 

Wither has a chance to gain a stack when it critically strikes. Stacks gained this way do not activate Blackened Soul.

entries.name: Xalan's Cruelty
entries.desc: Shadow damage dealt by your spells and abilities is increased by 6% and your Shadow spells gain 10% more critical strike chance from all sources.

entries.name: Xalan's Ferocity
entries.desc: Fire damage dealt by your spells and abilities is increased by 6% and your Fire spells gain 10% more critical strike chance from all sources.

entries.name: Hatefury Rituals
entries.desc: Wither deals 30% increased periodic damage but its duration is 15% shorter.

entries.name: Bleakheart Tactics
entries.desc: Wither damage increased 20%. When Wither gains a stack from Blackened Soul, it has a chance to gain an additional stack.

entries.name: Alzzin's Iniquity
entries.desc: Malevolence grants an additional 4% Haste and when cast increases the stack count of active Withers by an additional 2 stacks.

entries.name: Devil Fruit
entries.desc: Periodic damage dealt by Wither has a chance to grant Malevolence for 8 sec.

entries.name: Through the Felvine
entries.desc:
Increases the damage of Chaos Bolt by 35% and Rain of Fire by 6%.

This effect is doubled while Malevolence is active.
